description: Known-good labels for detect module tests. Captured during POC/dev; if these labels look wrong, the scan logic has regressed — not the fixtures.

ldplayer-capture.png.source: initial precision-craft screen profile capture (native LDPlayer resolution, pre-resize)
ldplayer-capture.png.note: No stat/rank labels — this capture predates stat reference work. Used only for screen-validation regression.

ldplayer-capture-roi.png.source: precision-craft capture with debug ROI boxes overlaid (red rectangles)
ldplayer-capture-roi.png.note: Overlays are drawn outside the screen-profile histogram ROIs, so validation still passes. Included as a robustness regression: the validator shouldn't over-reject based on incidental decoration elsewhere on screen.
